nine divisions are allotted to the first nine Rasis and then Capricom
statts from Taurus; Aquarius and Pisces follow accordingly. In this method,
planet's Rasi such as uchcha, nee<ha, friendly and inimical Ras.i is reckoned
from the amsas of the planets in the birth horoscope. The planets in
vchcha, moolatrikona and own in Navamsa are considered as mighty
planets. irrespective of planet's position in the birth horoscope. If a
planet is in an inimical Rasi in the birth horoscope, it is considered mighty
If It is posited in own or exalted Navamsa, and vice versa. When
Rajayogakaraka planets are posited in their own or exaltation, they left
the person to the top position in politics. Such mighty planets, if posited
either In ICendra or trikona. give prominent position and status.
